framing: EXPLORATORY + joint-Holm-with-Phase-1. Phase 0 MDE > +0.5 ExSharpe means Phase 3 confirmatory claims at 0.20 threshold are structurally out of reach; composites are reported as point estimates + 90% CIs alongside Phase 1 strategies under a joint Holm(Phase1 ∪ Phase3) correction. Gate CI + p are reported for audit; PASS/FAIL not the primary narrative.

strategies.name: piotroski_f_min7
strategies.rationale: Piotroski (2000) 9-point score; top F (≥7) names historically outperformed low-F by 7.5-13% annually. Post-McLean-Pontiff halving: expected ExS band [0.05, 0.20].

strategies.name: magic_formula
strategies.rationale: Greenblatt Magic Formula: rank by EY + ROIC, pick lowest rank-sum. Historical spread ~13%; post-decay expected ExS band [0.05, 0.20].

strategies.name: quality_value_zsum
strategies.rationale: Equal-weighted z-score sum of ROE + gross margin + earnings yield. Captures AQR-style 'quality at value' tilt. Post-decay expected ExS band [0.05, 0.20].

statistical_treatment.holm_scope: within phase (N=3); joint Holm(Phase1 ∪ Phase3) (N=7) also reported

exclusions.reason: Phase 3 composites consume fundamentals heavily; need 60-month train + reliable EDGAR coverage (post-2009 mandate).

known_limitations: Fundamentals panels pre-unioned with ALL restatements; per-query filter by filed_date < decision_date preserves PIT.
75 tickers have no yfinance data (pre-2015 delistings); these are absent from the universe → mild survivorship-adjacent bias on dropped names.

Delisting terminal returns are placeholder (0.0 for acquisitions, -0.99 for bankruptcies). Real GFC-era acquisition underperformance under-captured in `pre_2013` subperiod (which is skipped per `subperiod_min_years=5`).
Cost sensitivity in Phase 2 treats marginal commission only; absolute cost drag from `StockCostModel` bucket costs already folded into returns.

references_codex_r3.retraction: LowVol post_2013 CI-excludes-zero claim retracted 2026-04-20; seed-robustness test confirmed bootstrap-precision artifact. Phase 3 composites are evaluated under the same conservative multiplicity-aware framing.
deferred_tests: Real turnover plumbing for cost sensitivity (R3 M2)
